name: erp
description: ERP backend foundation for construction domain

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.verify:ci: npm run audit:prod && npm audit --audit-level=high && npm run prisma:validate && npm run validate:api-contract-yaml && npm run typecheck && npm run build:web && npm run test -w apps/web && npm test
scripts.verify:ci:with-migrate: npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run verify:ci
scripts.verify:ci:local-db: npm run ensure:local-test-db && sh -c 'export DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://erp:erp@127.0.0.1:5432/erp_test} PERSISTENCE_DB_TEST_URL=${PERSISTENCE_DB_TEST_URL:-postgresql://erp:erp@127.0.0.1:5432/erp_test} && npm run verify:ci:with-migrate'
